productName: Banana Pop Rocks Sugar Crystals [1g] [Lifted] [D.O.H. COMPLIANT]
description: Classic indica BHO crafted from Banana Pop Rocks — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Efficient and hard-hitting, a creamy, sweet banana flavor, delivering settle-in, melt-into-the-couch ease.
